common.retryError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

emotion.hint: Slide to capture how pleasant and how activated you feel right now.
emotion.padHint: Tap or drag to place how you feel
emotion.saveFailedMessage: Could not save your moment. Please try again.

log.valueStatement: Notice what moves you — patterns appear after a few quick logs.
log.tooltip: Pick the area of life this moment is about
log.bottomDefault: Every entry helps you see more clearly

prompts.returning: Welcome back. What's on your mind?
prompts.anxious: Anxiety's been around. Let's log it.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.tooltip: See your emotional moments over time
timeline.emptyBody: Your moments will appear here after logging.

streak.pausedBody: Log today to pick it back up.
streak.pausedBest: Your best run was {count} days. Log today to start again.

settings.title: Your space
settings.subtitle: Preferences & privacy
settings.signInHint: Sign in to sync across devices
settings.anonPremiumHint: Sign in to access premium features
settings.weeklyInsightsHint: Get notified when your weekly report is ready
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: This will erase all moments, insights, and patterns. It cannot be undone.
settings.privacyHint: Your data stays on-device until you sign in
settings.aboutBody: Map your emotional patterns, one moment at a time.

onboarding.slide1Body: Log moments to see which areas of life affect your mood.
onboarding.slide2Body: Weekly insights reveal what's really going on beneath the surface.
onboarding.slide3Body: Use your patterns to make better decisions about where to invest energy.
onboarding.slide4Body: You log two things: how pleasant it feels (bad → good) and your energy level (drained → charged). Together they pinpoint your emotional state. Your baseline is your personal average — a shift means something changed.

ftue.framingMessage: Each moment you log adds a data-point. Over time, patterns emerge, and that's where the insight lives.
ftue.whatHappened: What happened? Tap the area of life it touched.
ftue.howAffected: How did it affect you? Slide to where it feels right.
ftue.firstDataPointSub: One moment logged. Your timeline just started.
ftue.patternsFormingSub: Another data-point. Patterns are starting to take shape.
ftue.timelineExplain: Each moment shows up here as it happens.
ftue.patternsOverTime: Over time, patterns start forming. That's where insights come from.
ftue.insightsExplain: This is where your patterns show up. The more you log, the clearer they get.
ftue.actionsExplain: Small things you can try, based on what your data says.
ftue.closeLoop: Log moments when they happen. The patterns will follow.

nudge.insightsReady: You have enough data for real patterns. Check your weekly insights.
nudge.deeperPatterns: With this much data, your weekly report carries real weight. Take a look.

login.subtitleLogin: Sign in to pick up where you left off
login.subtitleRegister: Create an account to keep your data safe
login.trustText: Your data is encrypted and never shared
login.anonHint: No account needed, data stays on this device
login.privacyHint: We never share or sell your data

premium.title: See the full picture
premium.subtitle: Deep pattern analysis, behavioral signals, and actionable direction.
premium.previewText: Get a taste of what Premium reveals.
premium.transform1Before: I keep reacting the same way but don't understand why
premium.transform1After: Your patterns reveal that work stress triggers frustration most often on weekday evenings
premium.transform2Before: I feel off but can't tell what changed
premium.transform2After: Your emotional baseline shifted downward this week - energy dipped after Thursday
premium.transform3Before: I journaled but nothing useful came out of it
premium.transform3After: Your calm moments cluster around morning walks - that routine is working for you
premium.feature1: Deep pattern analysis across weeks and months
premium.feature2: Behavioral signals like drift, stability, and recovery
premium.feature3: Personalized adaptive modes - Move, Fuel, Perspective
premium.subscriptionUnavailableMessage: In-app purchases are not available on this device.
premium.purchaseIncompleteMessage: The purchase could not be completed. Please try again.
premium.restoredMessage: Your premium subscription has been restored.
premium.noSubscriptionMessage: We could not find an active subscription for this account.
premium.restoreFailedMessage: Could not restore subscription. Please try again.

report.somethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
report.subscriptionUnavailableMsg: In-app purchases are not available on this device.
report.starterSignedIn: A few more moments to go
report.starterBodySignedIn: Log at least 3 moments this week for your pattern report to take shape. With 5 or more, you unlock personalised AI insights that get sharper the more you log.
report.starterBodyAnon: Log at least 3 moments to see your first patterns. Sign in and log 5+ to unlock personalised AI insights.
report.lightWeek: Quiet week so far — showing your recent patterns and past insights.
report.silenceBannerBody: It's been {days} days since your last check-in. Here's what we still see from your previous activity.
report.unlockInsightsBody: Sign in for free to get personalised pattern analysis based on your data.
report.firstInsight: Your first insight is on the way
report.firstInsightBody: Log a few moments and come back to see your weekly patterns.
report.baselineForming: Baseline forming - keep logging for a clearer picture.
report.logMoreForState: Log more moments to see your current state.
report.crashRiskBody: A sustained negative pattern may be building. Pay attention to recovery.
report.falseRecoveryBody: Positive moments may be masking an underlying pattern. Stay aware.
report.maskingBody: Your expressed emotions may not fully reflect what's going on inside.
report.vacuumExplainer: The vacuum score measures your inner emotional fullness - how present and engaged you feel beneath the surface.
report.contextBleedExplainer: Context bleed means emotions from one area of life are spilling into others.
report.sameMoments: Same number of moments as last week
report.internalDriven: Your emotions this week were largely internally driven - more about your inner state than external triggers.
report.externalDriven: Your emotions this week were mostly triggered by external events and situations.
report.mixedDriven: A mix of internal states and external triggers shaped your week.
report.toneFromDays: Here's your tone from the days you logged.
report.toneShifted: Your emotional tone shifted day by day.
report.driftHint: How your daily tone compared to your personal baseline.
report.actionsOnWayBody: Once you have enough pattern data, personalised actions will appear here.
report.basedOnPatterns: Based on your patterns this week

progress.needMoreWeeks: Log for at least 2 weeks to see your progress trajectory.
progress.confidenceStrong: High confidence based on {weeks} weeks of data.
progress.confidenceEmerging: Patterns are still forming - keep logging.

prem.directionEmpty: Log more to get personalised direction.
prem.directionHint: Based on your patterns and signals this week.
prem.directionLocked: Sign in to unlock personalised direction based on your data.
prem.teaserHint: Upgrade to Premium for the full picture.
prem.paywallBody: Deep pattern analysis, behavioral signals, adaptive modes, and actionable direction - all powered by your data.
prem.shiftingHint: Premium reveals all your behavioral signals.
prem.driftUp: Your emotional tone is trending upward from your baseline.
prem.driftDown: Your emotional tone is trending below your baseline.
prem.driftStable: Your emotional tone is holding steady near your baseline.
prem.stabilityHigh: Your emotional patterns are consistent and predictable.
prem.stabilityLow: Your emotional patterns are variable - wider swings between moments.
prem.volatilityHigh: High day-to-day emotional variability. A lot is shifting.
prem.volatilityLow: Low variability - your days have been emotionally consistent.
prem.adjusting: We adjust suggestions based on what works for you.
prem.pastInsightsEmpty: Your insight history will appear here after your first AI analysis.

mode.moveHint: Small physical resets matched to your current state.
mode.fuelHint: Nourishment ideas that fit your energy and preferences.
mode.perspectiveHint: A calmer way to read the pattern in front of you.
mode.warmBody: Your personalised suggestions will appear here once we have enough data.
mode.coreBody: Switch to Move, Fuel, or Perspective for state-adaptive suggestions based on your patterns.
